# profile-badges

Use this skill for setting profile badges.

## Verified notes

- `cargo run --bin gnostr -- profile-badges --help` shows the live flags.
- `gnostr -V` should be checked when behavior differs across environments.

## Common commands

```bash
cargo run --bin gnostr -- profile-badges --help
gnostr profile-badges --help
```

## Rules

- Keep badge inputs explicit.
